title: Mike Grigsby
compiled_truth: Mike Grigsby is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (2000-02-11 to 2002-05-22), Mike Grigsby sent 978 and received 1455 emails, totalling 2433 interactions. Top correspondents: [Monique Sanchez](people/monique-sanchez) (129), [Anne Bike](people/anne-bike) (124), [Keith Holst](people/keith-holst) (117), [Tori Kuykendall](people/tori-kuykendall) (113), [Matthew Lenhart](people/matthew-lenhart) (111). Mailbox folders observed: 07_saved, 08_saved, 12_fantasy, _americas, _sent_mail, calendar.
